body.title: context-load token audit
body.result: MEMORY.md trimmed 60% (3105→1242 tokens). Slate Tools block moved to skill (saves 293 tokens/slate). Net savings: ~2156 tokens per conversation. Context-load budget: 1648 tokens (under 2000 cap). Removed stale entries, consolidated architecture decisions, eliminated code-derivable content.
body.description: Audit the full tree of artifacts /context-load reads: slate.md, blob tops, MEMORY.md, decisions_log.dsb top, channel read, session record. Measure token cost of each. Goal: identify redundant or over-loaded content, tighten blob top ceilings, trim MEMORY.md entries. Output: revised context-load skill + tighter load ceilings.
